title: Netafim India Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Netafim India Global Group is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Netafim India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Netafim India Global Group:
Netafim India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netafim India Global Group!
